global_description: A small, compact songbird with an olive-green back and yellow underparts. It has a short, straight bill and a distinctive white eyebrow stripe. The wings and tail are darker with subtle wing bars.

part_details.back: Olive-green, smooth feathers covering the upper body.
part_details.underparts: Bright yellow, soft feathers on the belly and chest.
part_details.eyebrow_stripe: Thin, white line above the eye, contrasting with the head color.
part_details.bill: Short, straight, and pointed, suitable for insect feeding.
part_details.wings: Darker than the body, featuring subtle wing bars.

spatial_relations: The white eyebrow stripe runs above the eye across the head.
The olive-green back transitions into yellow underparts.
The short bill is positioned at the front of the head.
